# Pokemon Fish (Real Name TBA)

Pokemon Fish is a project directly inspired by other overworld pokemon puzzle projects like SpinSpinSpin, Transform, and Celia's Stupid Romhack. The concept is that the player is tasked with completing "fishdex" and having to find all the different species living on a magic island. The player will find items and unlock field moves throughout the course of the game to open up more areas as the game progresses.

Some puzzles will require some out of the box thinking. For example, the player will encounter a fisher npc fishing on a signpost. If you talk to the NPC, he'll say "Can't you read? I'm trying to fish here." The signpost reads, "You can fish on anything that says 'fish' on it!" This will (hopefully) get players to interact with more of the world, and see all the hints hidden around the island for how to progress. (Intuitive players will also realize that you can fish on the NPC as well.)

This is a submission for the third Team Aqua Romhacking Competition.
